details: The scheme "Super 30" was launched by the Directorate of Secondary Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide free coaching for JEE/ NEET to the students who are appearing in the class 10th Board Final Examination and want to pursue Science Stream in Class 11th & 12th with the aspiration to crack the JEE / NEET exam.
benefits: The scheme covers the coaching fees (capped at ₹1,00,000/-) & the accommodation fees of ₹1,40,000/- per annum (with 5% extra in 2nd year), for attaining a two-year coaching programme for JEE/ NEET at a nationally reputed Coaching Institution outside Tripura.
eligibility: The applicant should be a resident of Tripura.
The applicant should be a student.
The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST)/ Scheduled Caste (SC)/ Person with Disability (PH) community.
The student should have passed the class-10th Pre-Board/ Pre-Test Exam from the government-recognized school of Tripura with 50% marks.
The applicant should be appearing for the class 10th board final exam.
The annual income of the family of the applicant should not exceed ₹1,00,000/-.

online: Click on “New Account”. Provide your phone number and fill in the captcha code in the designated field. An OTP will be generated and sent to the registered phone number.
Enter the OTP into the application to verify your phone number.
Once your phone number is verified, you'll be prompted to create a password for your account. Choose a strong and secure password.
Log in to the application using your registered phone number and the newly created password.
You'll be directed to the registration page again. Navigate to the registration section of the application.
Fill in all the required details in the registration form accurately, and submit the registration form.
Once your registration is successfully submitted, you may have the option to print the application form for your records or further processing.

documents_required: Original Income Certificate issued by the Sub-Divisional Magistrate (SDM)/ Deputy Commissioner of Magistrate (DCM).
Online generated Selection Test Admit Card.
Class X Board final mark sheet (60% and above marks applicable) including production of original marksheets.

faqs.question: What is the benefit provided under the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: Under the Super 30 Scheme, selected students may choose any nationally reputed Coaching Institution outside Tripura for a two-year coaching program for JEE/NEET, with capped coaching and accommodation fees.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligibility for the Super 30 Scheme includes being a resident of Tripura, a student from Scheduled Tribe (ST)/Scheduled Caste (SC)/Person with Disability (PH) community, passing the class 10th Pre-Board/Pre-Test Exam from recognized schools in Tripura with 50% marks, and the family's annual income not exceeding ₹1,00,000.

faqs.question: What is the selection procedure for students under the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: Selection for the Super 30 Scheme is based on the student's rank in the Selection Test and adherence to State Reservation Norms.

faqs.question: How are students counseled for selection in the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: Student counseling for selection in the Super 30 Scheme is facilitated through Heads of Institutions/Schools from which the student appeared for the 10 Board Final Exam.

faqs.question: Are there any reserved seats for specially-abled students in the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, one reserved seat is allocated for specially-abled (Divyang) students under the Super 30 Scheme.

faqs.question: Is there any age restriction for applicants of the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: There is no age restriction mentioned for applicants of the Super 30 Scheme.

faqs.question: Can students from other states apply for the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only students from Tripura are eligible to apply for the Super 30 Scheme.

faqs.question: Are there any preferences given to students based on their academic performance?
faqs.answer: Preferences for selection may be based on the applicant's performance in the Selection Test and existing State Reservation Norms.

faqs.question: What is the duration of the coaching program under the Super 30 Scheme?
faqs.answer: The coaching program under the Super 30 Scheme spans two years.

faqs.question: Are there any additional benefits provided to selected students apart from coaching fees and accommodation?
faqs.answer: Apart from coaching and accommodation fees, no additional benefits are specified under the Super 30 Scheme.

faqs.question: Are there any penalties for students who fail to complete the coaching program?
faqs.answer: There are no penalties mentioned for students who fail to complete the coaching program under the Super 30 Scheme.
